body:
## Problem
8 genre landing pages exist at `/genre/<slug>` but there are ZERO LLM markdown files for genre content anywhere in `public/llms/`. AI crawlers (ClaudeBot, GPTBot, PerplexityBot) cannot answer "best thrash metal drummers" or "what gear do death metal drummers use" using MetalForge data.

`ls public/llms/genres/` — directory does not exist.

## Files to create (8 new files)
```
public/llms/genres/thrash.md
public/llms/genres/death.md
public/llms/genres/black.md
public/llms/genres/progressive.md
public/llms/genres/nu-metal.md
public/llms/genres/groove.md
public/llms/genres/metalcore.md
public/llms/genres/hardcore.md
```

## Template per file (thrash example)
```markdown
# Thrash Metal Drummers — MetalForge Genre Guide

## Overview
Thrash metal drumming defined by: fast tempos (150–220+ BPM), double-bass pedal runs, aggressive snare backbeats. Pioneered by the Big Four: Metallica, Slayer, Megadeth, Anthrax.

## Featured Thrash Metal Drummers
| Drummer | Band | Signature Setup | Profile |
|---|---|---|---|
| Lars Ulrich | Metallica | Tama Starclassic + Zildjian A Custom | /drummer/lars-ulrich |
| Dave Lombardo | Slayer | Tama/Pearl + Zildjian | /drummer/dave-lombardo |
| Charlie Benante | Anthrax | Tama + Zildjian A Custom | /drummer/charlie-benante |
| Nick Menza | Megadeth | Tama Artstar II | /drummer/nick-menza |
| Dirk Verbeuren | Megadeth | Pearl Reference | /drummer/dirk-verbeuren |
| Jon Dette | Slayer/Testament | Tama + Paiste | /drummer/jon-dette |

## Key Technique Signatures
- 180+ BPM alternate-picking snare patterns
- Double-bass 16th-note runs with heel-toe technique
- Crash-accent on every fourth beat in fast passages

## Recommended Gear
- **Kick drum**: 22–24" bass drum (Tama Starclassic or Pearl Reference preferred)
- **Cymbals**: Zildjian A Custom 17" crash, Sabian HHX Evolution, Paiste RUDE Crash-Ride
- **Snare**: 14"x6.5" steel or maple (tight tuning, medium batter)
- **Pedals**: Pearl Demon Drive or Tama Iron Cobra 900 for blazing double bass

## FAQ
**Q: What BPM do thrash metal songs use?**
A: Typically 140–220 BPM. Slayer's "Raining Blood" runs at ~210 BPM; Metallica's "Battery" at ~180 BPM.

**Q: Who is the fastest thrash metal drummer?**
A: Dave Lombardo (Slayer) is widely regarded as the most technically proficient early thrash drummer; Lars Ulrich pioneered the genre's timing vocabulary.

**Q: What bass drum pedal setup is standard in thrash metal?**
A: Double pedal (two beaters, one bass drum) or double kick is essential. Pearl Demon Drive and Tama Iron Cobra are the top choices among signed thrash acts.

## Related Content
- [Lars Ulrich drum setup](/drummer/lars-ulrich)
- [Master of Puppets drum analysis](/articles/master-of-puppets-drum-setup)
- [Reign in Blood drum setup](/articles/reign-in-blood-drum-setup)
```

## Sitemap entry (api/sitemap.js)
```js
// Issue #XXXX: genre LLM citation surface — 8 genre pages
...getAllGenreSlugs().map(slug => ({ loc: `/llms/genres/${slug}.md`, priority: '0.5', changefreq: 'monthly' })),
```
Requires `import { getAllGenreSlugs } from '../packages/frontend/data/genres.js';` at top if not already present.

## Quality gate per file
- ≥300 words
- ≥5 MetalForge drummers listed with internal `/drummer/<slug>` links
- FAQ section with ≥3 Q&A
- Covers: overview, featured drummers table, technique hallmarks, recommended gear, FAQ

## Estimated organic uplift
Targets AI Overview on "[genre] metal drummer gear" queries — currently zero LLM coverage for any genre on MetalForge.

## Verify
1. `ls public/llms/genres/` — 8 files listed
2. `curl -s "https://metalforge.io/llms/genres/thrash.md"` — returns markdown with drummer table
3. `grep "llms/genres" api/sitemap.js` — 8 sitemap entries
4. Each file has ≥3 internal links to MetalForge drummer profiles
5. `/llms/index.md` references the new `genres/` directory

## Done
8 `/llms/genres/<slug>.md` files created; `api/sitemap.js` updated with 8 entries sourced from `getAllGenreSlugs()`.
title: SEO batch: /llms/genres/<slug>.md — 8 genre LLM files for AI citation (~8 files)
